creator: aaz@q-fu.com
text:
Created attachment 189098
update graphics/povray37 to 3.7.0.5

Here's a patch to update graphics/povray37 to 3.7.0.5, which is the latest release.

Changes:
- shared_ptr patches no longer needed
- use make install instead of custom install commands
- use @sample for conf files
- new FreeBSD compatibility patch due to changes in source layout
- new patch to correct paths to conf files and example scenes in povray.conf, since the FreeBSD port installs these to separate locations
